modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to receive scanned documents via email from Toshiba copier.

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to send some scans from the Toshiba copier to my email, but it just won’t work. I don’t know why, but the scans aren’t showing up in my Outlook at all. It’s really frustrating because I need those documents, and I’m not sure what’s going wrong with the whole email thing.
short_description: Unable to receive scanned documents via email from Toshiba copier.
description: So, I was trying to send some scans from the Toshiba copier to my email, but it just won’t work. I don’t know why, but the scans aren’t showing up in my Outlook at all. It’s really frustrating because I need those documents, and I’m not sure what’s going wrong with the whole email thing.
